ddt:Target.Name: ITM V1.5
ddt:Target.Description:
IT master ECU navigation
X74P2, X73P2, J81P2, X84P2
July 13th 2005, update for ITSP1P C1 testing:
Lionel PELLETIER 65620 SAE électronique carrosserie UET multimédia, projet ITS tél: 01349 54035 lionel.pelletier-renexter@renault.com

Data.Name: parameter: ILL_CONT
Data.Comment: Illumination control value from ILL_CONT line

Item.Text: Flash ROM error of control unit

Data.Name: Status: CD
Data.Comment: number of CD present in the player

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: front left tweeter test in progress (3kHz)
front right tweeter test in progress (3kHz)
front right loudspeaker test in progress (300Hz)
rear right loudspeaker test in progress (1kHz)
rear left loudspeaker test in progress (1kHz)
front left loudspeaker test in progress (300Hz)
open circuit or short circuit to ground
open circuit or short circuit to battery
test card 1 color bars on progress
test card 2 grey scales on progress
test card 3 white screen on progress

Data.Name: Session Name
Data.Comment: Mode d'ouverture de la section diag

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Test display grey scale test card

Device.Name: Flash ROM error of control unit

Send.RequestName: Test display grey scale test card
Test display grey scale test card

Button.Text: HFCK: audio lines test (need test stub)
HFCK: serial lines test (need test stub)
